name: Scope GitHub verify by changed app
description: Make the GitHub verify workflow run only the affected app checks and avoid installing or testing the unrelated workspace package.
evidence: .github/workflows/verify-code.yml now derives CI scope from git diff, including pnpm-lock.yaml importer sections, so web package changes only trigger web checks unless shared config changed; the helper script is itself part of the trigger/shared scope; it installs all dependencies once and runs the existing root scripts for the affected app checks; .github/workflows/harness-size-check.yml now path-filters to harness/script changes and skips unnecessary Node setup; validation completed locally by reviewing the workflow diff and parsing the workflow YAML structure.
